name: Heart-Shaped Cherry Scones
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup chilled butter, cut into bits
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak cherries in warm water. Let stand until softened, about 1 hour. Drain and discard the liquid.
2. Preheat oven to 375°F.
3. In a medium bowl, mix together all-purpose flour, whole wheat flour, sugar, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and nutmeg. Using a pastry blender, cut butter into the flour mixture until coarse crumbs form.
4. Mix together egg yolk and buttermilk in a separate bowl.
5. Make a well in the center of the flour mixture. Add the egg mixture and cherries all at once to the well, tossing with a fork until a soft dough forms.
6. Turn the dough out onto a floured surface. Knead the dough 10 times. Using a floured rolling pin, roll the dough to a thickness of about 1 inch. Using a floured 3-inch heart-shaped cookie cutter, cut out scones. Gather any trimmings and roll the dough into another 1-inch-thick rectangle; cut out more scones.
7. Place the scones about 1 inch apart on an ungreased baking sheet. Bake until golden brown, about 18 to 20 minutes. Transfer to a wire rack to cool. Dust with confectioners' sugar.
